---
title: "TE_Relevant_Genes"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r Enviroment Set Up, }
#loading libraries
library("tidyverse")
library("readxl")
library("readr")
library("ggrepel")
library("ggfortify")
library("patchwork")
library("eulerr")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("ggVennDiagram")
library("ggrastr")
library("edgeR")
library("limma")
library("ggsignif")
library("dplyr")
library("purrr")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyr")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")

BiocManager::install("ggalluvial")

```

```{r TopTable_Symbols}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")

# Extract Ensembl IDs for every row
ens_ids <- sub("\\..*$", "", TopTable$Gene)

# Make a lookup table
symbol_map <- mapIds(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys = unique(ens_ids),
    column = "SYMBOL",
    keytype = "ENSEMBL",
    multiVals = "first"
)

TopTable$Symbol <- unname(symbol_map[ens_ids])

saveRDS(TopTable,"data/DGE/TopTable_Symbols_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
```
```{r KZFPs}
KZFPs <- read_excel("data/TEs/KZFPs_list.xlsx")

# saveRDS(KZFPs,"data/TEs/KZFPs.RDS")

KZFPs_list <- KZFPs$Label

# saveRDS(KZFPs_list,"data/TEs/KZFPs_list.RDS")

```


```{r KZFP_enrichment_function}

KZFP_enrichment <- function(comparisons, TopTable, KZFPs_list) {
  
  results <- lapply(comparisons, function(group) {
    
    test_genes <- TopTable %>%
      filter(Comparisons == group) %>%
      distinct(Symbol)
    
    deg_genes <- TopTable %>%
      filter(Comparisons == group,
             adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%
      distinct(Symbol)
    
    not_deg_genes <- setdiff(test_genes$Symbol, deg_genes$Symbol)
    
    tab <- matrix(
      c(
        sum(deg_genes$Symbol %in% KZFPs_list),
        sum(deg_genes$Symbol %notin% KZFPs_list),
        sum(not_deg_genes %in% KZFPs_list),
        sum(not_deg_genes %notin% KZFPs_list)
      ),
      nrow = 2,
      byrow = TRUE
    )
    
    fisher <- fisher.test(tab)
    
    data.frame(
      Comparison = group,
      KZFP_DEG = tab[1,1],
      NonKZFP_DEG = tab[1,2],
      KZFP_not_DEG = tab[2,1],
      NonKZFP_not_DEG = tab[2,2],
      Odds_Ratio = fisher$estimate,
      Fisher_p = fisher$p.value
    )
  })
  
  do.call(rbind, results)
}

```

```{r FischerTest_OddsRation_plotting}

plot_OR <- function(results, group_to_plot) {
  
  plot_data <- results %>%
    filter(Comparison_Group %in% group_to_plot) %>%
    mutate(
      label = ifelse(FDR < 0.05, "*", ""),
      log2_OR = log2(Odds_Ratio)
    )
  
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(Comparison, log2_OR)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = label),
      vjust = -1
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    )
}
```

```{r KZFP,fig.height=4, fig.width=7}


TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_Symbols_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
KZFPs_list <- readRDS("data/TEs/KZFPs_list.RDS")

comparisons <- unique(TopTable$Comparisons)

KZFP_results <- KZFP_enrichment(
  comparisons,
  TopTable,
  KZFPs_list
)

KZFP_results$FDR <- p.adjust(KZFP_results$Fisher_p, method = "BH")

KZFP_results

comparison_order <- c(
  "HvC_Day0",
  "HvC_Day2",
  "HvC_Day5",
  "HvC_Day15",
  "HvC_Day30",
  "H_Day02",
  "H_Day25",
  "H_Day515",
  "H_Day1530",
  "C_Day02",
  "C_Day25",
  "C_Day515",
  "C_Day1530",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530"
)

KZFP_results <- KZFP_results %>%
  mutate(
    Comparison = factor(Comparison, levels = comparison_order)
  )

KZFP_results <- KZFP_results %>%
  mutate(
    Comparison_Group = case_when(
      grepl("^HvC", Comparison) ~ "Species",
      grepl("inter", Comparison) ~ "Interaction",
      grepl("^[HC]_Day", Comparison) ~ "Trajectory",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(Significant = FDR < 0.05)

plot_OR(KZFP_results, "Species")

plot_OR(KZFP_results, "Interaction")

plot_OR(KZFP_results, "Trajectory")
```

```{r KZFP_FC}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_Symbols_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
KZFPs_list <- readRDS("data/TEs/KZFPs_list.RDS")

comparisons <- unique(TopTable$Comparisons)

comparison_order <- c(
  "HvC_Day0",
  "HvC_Day2",
  "HvC_Day5",
  "HvC_Day15",
  "HvC_Day30",
  "H_Day02",
  "H_Day25",
  "H_Day515",
  "H_Day1530",
  "C_Day02",
  "C_Day25",
  "C_Day515",
  "C_Day1530",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530"
)

KZFP_all <- TopTable %>%
  filter(
    Comparisons %in% comparison_order,
    Symbol %in% KZFPs_list
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Comparisons = factor(
      Comparisons,
      levels = comparison_order
    )
  )

ggplot(KZFP_all, aes(Comparisons, logFC)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

KZFP_FC <- TopTable %>%
  filter(
    Comparisons %in% comparisons,
    Symbol %in% KZFPs_list
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Comparisons, Symbol, logFC, adj.P.Val)

KZFP_DEG <- TopTable %>%
  filter(
    Comparisons %in% comparisons,
    Symbol %in% KZFPs_list,
    adj.P.Val < 0.05
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Comparisons, Symbol, logFC, adj.P.Val)

KZFP_DEG %>%
  filter(grepl("^HvC", Comparisons)) %>%
  arrange(Comparisons, desc(logFC))

KZFP_DEG_direction <- KZFP_DEG %>%
  mutate(
    Direction = case_when(
      
      # Species contrasts
      grepl("^HvC", Comparisons) & logFC > 0 ~ "Higher in Human",
      grepl("^HvC", Comparisons) & logFC < 0 ~ "Higher in Chimp",
      
      # Human trajectory contrasts
      grepl("^H_Day", Comparisons) & logFC > 0 ~ "Human increased",
      grepl("^H_Day", Comparisons) & logFC < 0 ~ "Human decreased",
      
      # Chimp trajectory contrasts
      grepl("^C_Day", Comparisons) & logFC > 0 ~ "Chimp increased",
      grepl("^C_Day", Comparisons) & logFC < 0 ~ "Chimp decreased",
      
      # Species x trajectory interactions
      grepl("^Sig_Sp_inter", Comparisons) & logFC > 0 ~ "Human-Chimp difference increased",
      grepl("^Sig_Sp_inter", Comparisons) & logFC < 0 ~ "Human-Chimp difference decreased",
      
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    )
  ) %>%
  count(Comparisons, Direction)
```


```{r KZFP_alluvial}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_Symbols_Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_fc_NoRep_No4.RDS")
KZFPs_list <- readRDS("data/TEs/KZFPs_list.RDS")

comparisons <- unique(TopTable$Comparisons)

comparison_order <- c(
  "HvC_Day0",
  "HvC_Day2",
  "HvC_Day5",
  "HvC_Day15",
  "HvC_Day30",
  "H_Day02",
  "H_Day25",
  "H_Day515",
  "H_Day1530",
  "C_Day02",
  "C_Day25",
  "C_Day515",
  "C_Day1530",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515",
  "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530"
)


KZFP_alluvial <- TopTable %>%
  filter(
    Symbol %in% KZFPs_list,
    Comparisons %in% comparison_order
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Direction = case_when(
      adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC > 0 ~ "Up",
      adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ "Not significant"
    ),
    Comparison_Group = case_when(
      grepl("^HvC", Comparisons) ~ "Species",
      grepl("^H_Day", Comparisons) ~ "Human",
      grepl("^C_Day", Comparisons) ~ "Chimp",
      grepl("^Sig_Sp_inter", Comparisons) ~ "Interaction",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    Comparisons = factor(
      Comparisons,
      levels = comparison_order
    )
  )

plot_KZFP_alluvial <- function(data, group_to_plot) {
  
  plot_data <- data %>%
    filter(Comparison_Group == group_to_plot)
  
  ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = Comparisons,
      stratum = Direction,
      alluvium = Symbol,
      y = 1,
      fill = Direction
    )
  ) +
    geom_alluvium(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_stratum() +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = "Number of KZFPs",
      title = group_to_plot
    )
}



Species_plot <- plot_KZFP_alluvial(
  KZFP_alluvial,
  "Species"
)

Human_plot <- plot_KZFP_alluvial(
  KZFP_alluvial,
  "Human"
)

Chimp_plot <- plot_KZFP_alluvial(
  KZFP_alluvial,
  "Chimp"
)

Interaction_plot <- plot_KZFP_alluvial(
  KZFP_alluvial,
  "Interaction"
)

Species_plot
Human_plot
Chimp_plot
Interaction_plot



```
